SHOOT.title: Shoot
SHOOT.description: If you have ammo in your cylinder, spend 1 ammo, gain [gold]Imprint[/gold], and deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
RELOAD.title: Reload
RELOAD.description:
Load 2 ammo into your cylinder (max 6).{IfUpgraded:show:
Load Enhanced ammo.|}
EVASION.title: Evasion
EVASION.description:
This turn, damage you take is halved.{IfUpgraded:show:
Also reduce damage taken by 1.|}
IMPRINT_BARRAGE.title: Imprint Barrage
IMPRINT_BARRAGE.description: Consume all [gold]Imprint[/gold]. For each Imprint, deal {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} damage to a random enemy.
PANNING.title: Panning
PANNING.description: Consume all loaded rounds. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage per chamber.
SEAL_LOAD.title: Seal Load
SEAL_CHECK.title: Seal Check
SEAL_CHECK.description: If you have a Seal Bullet loaded, draw 1 card.
SEAL_SEARCH.title: Seal Track
SEAL_RITE.title: Seal Rite
SEAL_RITE.description: [gold]Power[/gold]: At end of your turn, a Seal Bullet gains +1 additional level.
SEAL_OPEN.title: Seal Open
SEAL_OPEN.description: Move your highest-level Seal Bullet to the firing chamber.
PRECISION_SHOT.title: Precision Shot
PRECISION_SHOT.description: Fire 1 round (if empty, rotate only). Gain 2 Imprint.
EXECUTION_SHOT.title: Execution Shot
EXECUTION_SHOT.description: Fire 1 round (if empty, rotate only). If the target is at or below half HP, deal increased damage. Gain 3 Imprint.
